daily_summary.headline: Artemis II Prepares for Historic Lunar Flyby

top_events.title: SLS Block 1 | Artemis II
top_events.description: Artemis II is the first crewed mission as part of the Artemis program, sending a crew of 4 around the moon.
top_events.action: Watch live broadcast and follow mission updates.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A strong geomagnetic storm (G2) is expected, providing a good aurora viewing opportunity at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Plan to view the aurora if you're at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Tianlong-3 Demo Flight
top_events.description: First test launch of Space Pioneer’s Tianlong-3 rocket, potentially carrying satellites for a new constellation.
top_events.action: Follow updates on this maiden flight.

alerts.title: SLS Block 1 | Artemis II Launch
alerts.message: Artemis II is the first crewed mission as part of the Artemis program, sending a crew of 4 around the moon. This historic mission marks a significant milestone in human space exploration.
alerts.action_required: Watch live broadcast and follow mission updates.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
